ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fpga_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FPGA design */,
  "fpga_type" TEXT /* Type of FPGA (e.g., AXI4/AXI3 for 7 series Family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FPGA design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the design was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., Draft, In Review, Approved) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the design */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the design belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fpga_designs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fpga_designs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fifo_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIFO configuration */,
  "fifo_type" TEXT /* Type of FIFO (e.g., Distributed RAM, Block RAM) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., Write Address, Write Data, Write Response, Read Address, Read Data) */,
  "id_width" INTEGER /* Width of the ID field */,
  "address_width" INTEGER /* Width of the address field */,
  "data_width" INTEGER /* Width of the data field */,
  "fifo_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the FIFO */,
  "fifo_width" INTEGER /* Width of the FIFO */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., Draft, In Review, Approved) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing performance metrics (e.g., latency, throughput) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fifo_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fifo_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel type */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel type (e.g., Write Address, Write Data, Write Response, Read Address, Read Data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the channel */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the channel was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the channel */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the channel was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the channel (e.g., Active, Deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fifo_channel_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FIFO configuration */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., Active, Deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fifo_channel_configs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fifo_channel_configs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fpga_fifo_configs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FPGA design */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FIFO configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., Active, Deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id", "config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fpga_fifo_configs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fpga_fifo_configs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, administrator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Suspended, Deactivated) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the user is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design history entry */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FPGA design */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., Pending, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_history_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES fpga_designs ("design_id")
)
